title:
AN ACT CREATING BARRIO PAREL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BOTOLAN, PROVINCE OF
ZAMBALES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1067 / 67 OG No. 36, 7042 (September 6, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6200, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CREATING BARRIO PAREL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BOTOLAN, PROVINCE OF

ZAMBALES.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines

in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Parel in the Municipality of Botolan, Province of Zambales, is hereby converted into a distinct and independent barrio of said municipality, to be known as Barrio Parel.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
